## What

A short description of the change.

## Why

The motivation — what problem this solves or which issue it closes (e.g. `Closes #12`).

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes with no errors
- [ ] Works cross-platform (no hardcoded path separators, tested on my OS at minimum)
- [ ] README updated if behavior/config changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under `Unreleased` (skip for docs-only changes)
